design_philosophy: A premium, top-tier global pharmaceutical brand style. Elegant, expensive, minimal, and highly credible. Uses clean white space, a strong typography hierarchy, and a premium grid-based layout. It avoids generic e-commerce looks, leaning into a 'Big Pharma' authority mixed with modern editorial health and wellness elements.

primary.description: Trust, CTAs, headings, navigation, main interactions.

accent.description: Cyan: Wellness icons. Green: Nutraceutical accents. Gold/Coral: Subtle badges/callouts.

text.description: Navy for headings and high-contrast readable elements, body gray for paragraphs.

background.description: White as the main canvas, Light Background for alternating sections, Dark Navy for footer and heavy contrast sections.

scale.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-semibold text-[#12233D]

spacing_and_layout.grid_bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 lg:gap-8

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-[#E9EEF5]

buttons.primary: bg-[#0738A6] text-white hover:bg-[#052C82] font-semibold px-6 py-3 rounded-full transition-all shadow-md hover:shadow-lg
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#0738A6] text-[#0738A6] hover:bg-[#F7FAFD] font-semibold px-6 py-3 rounded-full transition-all
buttons.wellness: bg-[#9DCD4A] text-[#12233D] hover:bg-[#8BBA3A] font-semibold px-6 py-3 rounded-full transition-all

cards.standard: bg-white border border-[#E9EEF5] p-8 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(7,56,166,0.12)]
cards.admin: bg-white border border-[#E9EEF5] p-6 rounded-xl shadow-sm

forms.input: w-full bg-white border border-[#E9EEF5] rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-[#12233D] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0738A6] focus:border-transparent outline-none transition-all
forms.label: block text-sm font-medium text-[#12233D] mb-1

hero_carousel.details: Left side: Typography-heavy with H1 and Primary CTA. Right side: Premium image inside a rounded-2xl container with a subtle shadow. 3 slides rotating seamlessly.

trust_strip.details: 4-column grid of large numbers/stats in #0738A6 with sub-labels in #4B5563. Use counting animation if possible.

what_we_do.details: Cards for Oncology, MDI Inhalers, Critical Care, Biologicals, Nutraceuticals. Icons colored in #62C7F5 or #9DCD4A. Clean white backgrounds.

global_presence.layout: Full width with background map image
global_presence.details: Use the generated global network map as a background with #12233D overlay at 80% opacity, white text, and glowing accent points.

founder_message.details: Left: Professional founder portrait. Right: Large quote text in Poppins with a gold (#F2C14E) accent line or quote icon.

partner_marquee.details: Use react-fast-marquee. Text-based or logo-based, grayscale logos fading in, highly spaced (gap-24).

admin_panel.components_used: Shadcn/UI Tables, Forms, Dialogs, Cards. Data tables for contact inquiries, forms for editing homepage content.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle -translate-y-1 and shadow-lg on cards. Button backgrounds darken.
motion_and_interactions.entrance: Fade-in-up staggered animations for lists and grid items using framer-motion.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Ensure focus states ring-2 ring-[#0738A6] on interactive elements. Respect prefers-reduced-motion.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case format.
